name: China Energy Group Public Welfare Foundation

sample_grants.title: Targeted assistance and targeted support
sample_grants.description: The Foundation insists on focusing on the targeted assistance work of the State Energy Group and the overall plan of the Group to promote rural revitalization, and timely disburses assistance funds according to the progress of the project.
